accept_if: every emitted artifact passes round-trip and digest validation
every receipt carries the G8 receipt schema and matches its unit directory
certificate_soundness.failure_action: block release and open a defect investigation; do not relax a premise

conditional_layer_unchanged.accept_if: the conditional layer is produced solely by the pinned G7 modules under the frozen implementation digests (delegation unchanged; fresh draws make byte-comparison against a sealed block impossible by construction), and the G8 overlay is strictly additive: one g8-t6-interior-decisiveness.json beside the G7-layer artifacts, never a modification of them
conditional_layer_unchanged.failure_action: block release; a G7-layer difference means the pinned delegation is broken

no_regression.accept_if: the G7 no_regression rule (byte-identity with the sealed G6 block) is unsatisfiable and meaningless on fresh draws and is replaced, not imported: the frozen G0-G5 tree, baseline manifest, spec digest, and G8 implementation digests are unchanged (enforced by repository preflight), and the loader's own seed-derivation/expansion self-validation passes for all 44 fresh draws
no_regression.failure_action: block release; the pinned base layers moved

tight_bound_soundness.accept_if: bound_soundness_violation_count == 0 in every g8-t6-interior-decisiveness.json artifact across all 44 worlds and every solved branch
tight_bound_soundness.failure_action: block release and open a defect investigation; a violation under the tight bound is a float-slack breach or implementation defect by theorem, never a discarded witness
tight_bound_soundness.theorem_status: exact-arithmetic theorem (obs <= |g.r| + solver_bound <= bound, triangle inequality); its only empirical content is the disclosed heuristic float slack

tight_bound_tightness.accept_if: at every evaluated interior witness, bound - observed <= 2 * field_tolerance + slack constants; no witness-exclusion (observed_within_bound) alarm fires anywhere in the block
tight_bound_tightness.failure_action: block release and open a defect investigation; do not relax a bound or tolerance
tight_bound_tightness.theorem_status: both inequalities are exact-arithmetic theorems (triangle inequality; the 2*solver_bound form is analytically forced, not tuned on sealed data); their only empirical content is the disclosed heuristic float slack

analysis_precommitment.status: committed and frozen in the amendment chain before this manifest was authored (plan section 7.2); it is the only sanctioned first read of the sealed Part II block, an aggregator that adds no bound, threshold, or criterion

cohort.selection: literal-by-value; runtime imports from graphlog.DEFAULT_WORLDS or multiweb_graphlog.HELDOUT are forbidden

data_protocol.replacement_policy: no replacement, deletion, rerun, or substitution; the fresh draws are minted once from the committed beacon-derived master seed and never redrawn; any environmentally interrupted run follows the G7 refuse-resume rule: delete the partial state unobserved, amend, relaunch

draw_provenance.float_slack_status: the 1e-9 relative and absolute slack constants shared with the pinned G7 bound cover floating-point contamination of the residual and Green's-row solves heuristically (standard LU forward-error estimates at measured condition numbers 86-348 give ~2e-10, a 5-10x margin), not by certified interval arithmetic; this applies equally to the shipped G7 bound and the G8 tight bound

part1_ordering_witness.role: ordering witness only, proving the Part I verification block sealed before this manifest was authored; never a seed source -- Part I outputs are precomputable by design

seed_source.commitment_committed_before_pulse: git commit 0c762dc pinned the commitment at 2026-07-23T03:01:09Z, before the selected pulse's timeStamp; the commit predating the pulse is the commitment's force
seed_source.derivation: master_seed = SHA-256(hex_decode(pulse.outputValue)), per the committed formula; re-checkable forever against the beacon's public archive at the pulse uri

manifest_id_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON with manifest_id omitted

empirical_claims.3_hedge_localization_fresh_draws: for every conditioned world the unconditioned field's mean absolute error on agreeing coordinates is <= 0.1 (the one G7 acceptance rule with real empirical teeth on new draws; it can genuinely fail, and a failure is reported as an empirical failure, not a defect)
empirical_claims.4_conditions_iff_ambiguous: conditions are invented iff |S| > 1, with the G7 cap and overflow semantics; AMBIGUITY_OVERFLOW is a reported outcome, not a defect -- fresh seeds may organically exercise multibit paths never run under any seed, and the synthetic tests are the only prior validation, which is disclosed

explicitly_not_predicted: the number of ambiguous worlds under the fresh seeds
the number of worlds that interior-separate
exactly one decisive coordinate per world (the sealed non-certifying margins -0.194, -0.057, -0.030, -0.006 against certifying +0.023, +0.301, +0.384 show these are draw-specific facts)

instrument_claims.1_soundness: zero bound-soundness violations under the tight bound (acceptance rule tight_bound_soundness); failure is an implementation/float defect, never evidence about the mechanism
instrument_claims.2_tightness: at every evaluated interior witness, bound_c - observed_c <= 2*solver_bound + slacks (acceptance rule tight_bound_tightness); guarantees the instrument reads the oracle margin to ~2e-6, which is what makes the measured counts trustworthy

part2_preregistered_claims.motivation_honesty: the claim under measurement is 'conditioning makes at least one disputed coordinate decisive', not 'conditioned fields snap into their valleys': the sealed draws show hedging and one anti-propagating coordinate (rule_2 X:5:8, branch 1 settling at -0.007 against its own cochain value 1)

non_vacuity.rule: if fewer than 2 worlds have |S| > 1 under the fresh draws, the block is reported empirically uninformative for interior decisiveness and no mechanism claim of any strength is made (ambiguity incidence was 3/44 under one seed; zero is a live possibility and must not read as success)

secondary_report.discipline: measured outcomes under the G7 secondary-report discipline: the interior-decisiveness count, per-witness margins, the anti-propagation count (promoted from open question to preregistered secondary metric), and the max (not just mean) off-scope field error, since sealed rule_2 hides a 1.10 pointwise excursion under a passing 0.016 mean
secondary_report.failure_semantics: a world where no interior witness certifies but the pivot fallback separates is not a failure of any preregistered claim; it lands in the secondary report

derivation.concatenation: hex_decode(master_seed_hex) || utf8(world_name), with no delimiter or terminator
derivation.draw_seed_conversion: interpret the complete 32-byte digest as one unsigned big-endian integer

seed.master_seed_generation: derived from NIST Randomness Beacon chain 2 pulse 1871520 (timeStamp 2026-07-23T03:20:00.000Z), the unique pulse selected by the pre-committed rule in results/graphlog-certified/g8-seed-commitment.json (committed to git before the pulse existed): master_seed = SHA-256(hex_decode(pulse.outputValue)); no other master seed was ever expanded for Part II
